text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Winning Ticket hasn't shown up for training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's strange, because she always fully applies
herself to practice. Wondering if something
happened, I hurry out to look for her.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yaaay, I did it! I finally got it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Ticket coming out of a sports supply store
near the station.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, the clerk was so kind. ♪ We ended up
having a whole conversation!
choice_data_list: You seem to be in a good mood!
You seem to be in a good mood!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Well, yeah! I'm feeling great!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You'll never guess why! You know my favorite
cycling gear brand, Two-Five Double?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, I managed to get my hands on one of their
mega-premium items! ♪

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I've never been able to get one before, but my
cycling buddy told me about this sale!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
When I saw it in real life, it looked even better
than I expected! Two-Five Double gear really is
the greatest!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gaaah! I totally forgot about it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I warn Winning Ticket to pay more attention next
time.
